labels.name: duplicate
labels.description: This issue or pull request already exists

labels.name: wontfix
labels.description: This will not be worked on

issues.title: Several issues in section titled "Application Layer Response Header"
issues.author: garyillyes
issues.body:
1. Upon closer inspection the structured field doesn't parse. Update to `Robots-Tag: ;noindex;nosnippet, examplebot `
2. Use HTTP, don't abstract to "Application layer".

issues.title: Conflicting `X-robots-tag` and `robots-tag`
issues.author: garyillyes
issues.body:
it's unspecified what happens when there's both an x-robots-tag & a robots-tag header.

recommendation: if `robots-tag` is specified, use that.

comments.author: dwsmart
comments.body: It would, in my opinion, be good to specify if a implementor should create a union of values in the `robots-tag` header and `<meta>` elements, in the same way a union should be created with multiple `<meta>`.
